'''Mak''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[General/Legends|general]] who, in the company of [[Darth/Legends|Darth]] [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Vader]] and [[Nas Ghent]], searched for the [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer]] [[Crucible (Imperial-class)|''Crucible'']] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

{{Char-stub}}
